meaning: n.把人打昏的人,绝妙的东西,出色的人
examples: One of the girls was an absolute stunner.
Created over five years, Mary and Max is a visual stunner about the emotionally stunted.
The other stunner is that Hillary Clinton could slip to third, again, in New Hampshire.
Kerry Washington was a stunner in a marigold lace and fringed number from Stella McCartney.
